client_name: Archetype - Founder-led B2B SaaS without marketing hire
geography_fit: US / Canada / UAE; California / Texas / New York / Massachusetts first
buyer_titles: Founder; Co-Founder; CEO
main_pain: Needs founder visibility plus a simple content and SEO base without hiring a full team

disqualifiers: No traction; no visible marketing activity; enterprise with large in-house team

client_name: Archetype - Lean B2B SaaS or AI SaaS marketing team
stage_fit: Seed to Series A lean team
geography_fit: US / Canada / UAE; California / Texas / New York / Massachusetts first
company_size_fit: 11-50 ideal; 51-200 strong fit; 201-500 allowed if signal-rich
buyer_titles: Head of Marketing; VP Marketing; Marketing Director; Growth Marketing Manager
main_pain: Team is shipping but needs outside execution across content, SEO, social, and launches
urgency_signals: Active blog; case studies; launches; webinars; marketing hiring; strong LinkedIn motion
disqualifiers: No marketing motion; pre-traction startup; enterprise-scale in-house team
notes: Core archetype for first-wave outreach.

client_name: Archetype - Revenue, sales, or customer-facing software
geography_fit: US / Canada / UAE
company_size_fit: 11-50 ideal; 51-200 strong fit; 201-500 acceptable with clear GTM urgency
buyer_titles: Head of Marketing; Demand Generation Manager; Growth Marketing Manager; Product Marketing Manager
main_pain: Needs content and campaign execution tied more clearly to pipeline, demos, and customer acquisition
urgency_signals: Demo-heavy GTM language; webinars; launches; customer stories; demand gen hiring
disqualifiers: Weak product-led motion; consulting-heavy positioning; no visible content or launch activity
notes: Core commercial sub-segment because the value proposition maps directly to revenue language.

client_name: Archetype - Workflow, ops, and automation software
stage_fit: Seed to Series A lean team
geography_fit: US / Canada / UAE
company_size_fit: 11-50 ideal; 51-200 strong fit; 201-500 allowed with strong launch motion
buyer_titles: Product Marketing Manager; Head of Content; CEO; Head of Marketing
main_pain: Technical product needs clearer messaging, launch follow-through, and ongoing market-facing execution
urgency_signals: Feature releases; roadmap updates; technical blog; documentation with weak narrative; lean GTM team
disqualifiers: No GTM motion; services-heavy company; implementation-led firm
notes: Still core, but usually sits behind the highest-intent SaaS and revenue software targets unless urgency is very clear.

client_name: Archetype - Analytics, data, and infrastructure software
geography_fit: US / Canada / UAE
company_size_fit: 11-50 ideal; 51-200 strong fit; 201-500 acceptable with clear content ops need
buyer_titles: Product Marketing Manager; Head of Content; SEO Manager; Head of Marketing
main_pain: Needs technical content, market translation, and stronger distribution to turn product depth into demand
urgency_signals: Thought-leadership content; technical SEO need; research or product education motion; launch cadence
disqualifiers: No visible audience-building; pure services delivery; enterprise-scale internal team
notes: High-fit technical software bucket, especially when attribution and distribution matter.

client_name: Archetype - Boutique agency needing white-label support
